evals.prompt: Set a goal from: make onboarding much better.
evals.expected_output: The skill asks only consequential questions, proposes a concise kebab-case goal, and waits for confirmation before writing it.
assertions: The goal requires intent and a validation contract
The slug is lowercase kebab-case with no special characters and at most six words
The skill does not create a spec or plan
The skill does not write the goal before confirmation

evals.prompt: Review goals/auth-reliability.md; its automated validation passes.
evals.expected_output: A passing explicit review appends concise evidence and sets front matter status to achieved.
assertions: The validation checks observable reality
The review entry records procedure, result, evidence, and decision
The front matter status is set to achieved
The goals index is synchronized

evals.prompt: Review goals/auth-reliability.md; the check runs but the expected result is not met.
evals.expected_output: A failed review records concise evidence, leaves the goal active, and records one next action.
assertions: The result is fail rather than blocked
The goal remains active
Exactly one next action is recorded
No retry or loop starts automatically

evals.prompt: Review a visual goal, but no distinct reviewer agent is available.
evals.expected_output: The independent-review procedure is blocked rather than self-evaluated.
assertions: The worker does not review its own output
The review is recorded as blocked
Lifecycle status is unchanged
No substitute self-assessment is treated as evidence

evals.prompt: Continue goal-backed work whose goal path is goals/missing.md, but that file does not exist.
evals.expected_output: The workflow reports the broken provenance path and stops.
assertions: The missing goal path is named
The workflow does not silently treat the work as goal-free
The workflow stops until the path is corrected or explicitly detached

evals.prompt: Lint goals/stale-goal.md; its timestamps lack timezone offsets and it has not been reviewed in 100 days.
evals.expected_output: Goal lint reports both malformed timestamps and staleness without modifying the goal.
assertions: Point-in-time fields are checked for numeric timezone offsets
The stale active goal is reported
The goal file is not modified
No proactive goal hint is emitted

evals.prompt: Have agents debate whether this ambition should become a goal.
evals.expected_output: Debate intent routes to loam::configuring-agents rather than creating a goal.
assertions: Explicit debate intent wins over goal setting
No goal artifact is created before the debate concludes

evals.prompt: A regular approved spec has no goal provenance. Continue through planning and execution.
evals.expected_output: The existing goal-free workflow remains unchanged.
assertions: No goal file is required or fabricated
The normal spec-plan-execution workflow proceeds
